title: GPA Calculator - Calculate Grade Point Average
description: Free GPA calculator. Calculate your grade point average by entering courses, credits, and grades.
keywords: GPA calculator, grade point average, college GPA, cumulative GPA
intro: Calculate your grade point average (GPA) by entering your courses, credit hours, and letter grades.

faq.a: GPA = sum of (credits × grade points) / total credits. For example, an A (4.0) in a 3-credit course contributes 12 grade points.
